1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
6	cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"
7	
8	MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
9	PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
10	TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
11	PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET="${PLANNING_PORTS:+1}"
12	PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
13	PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-1}"
14	PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES:-}"
15	PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT="${PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT:-0.2}"
16	EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
17	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
18	MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
19	MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
20	NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
21	ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR="${ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR:-0}"
22	TP8_SIDECAR_PORT="${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
23	TP8_SIDECAR_CORES="48-55"
24	TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912}"
25	ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS="${ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS:-0}"
26	TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
27	TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS + 1))}"
28	TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/27b98ea6f3cabed3fd9ed630d1a2996e28998618d11e43538edbd3d3e09c3586}"
29	
30	planning_ports_include() {
31	    local target="$1" item start end
32	    local endpoints=()
33	    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
34	    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
35	        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
36	            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
37	            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
38	            if (( target >= start && target <= end )); then
39	                return 0
40	            fi
41	        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( target == 10#$item )); then
42	            return 0
43	        fi
44	    done
45	    return 1
46	}
47	
48	# The current custom artifact cannot chunk a cold prompt whose uncached suffix
49	# exceeds 16k, so only two long trajectories may retain each endpoint's APC
50	# state. Native scheduling uses chunked prefill and may use any replica.
51	PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="${PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE:-}"
52	if [[ -z "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" ]]; then
53	    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
54	        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="request"
55	    else
56	        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="trajectory"
57	    fi
58	fi
59	case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
60	    custom | native) ;;
61	    *)
62	        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
63	        exit 2
64	        ;;
65	esac
66	case "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" in
67	    trajectory | affinity | request) ;;
68	    *)
69	        echo "PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE must be trajectory, affinity, or request" >&2
70	        exit 2
71	        ;;
72	esac
73	case "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" in
74	    0 | 1) ;;
75	    *)
76	        echo "ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR must be 0 or 1" >&2
77	        exit 2
78	        ;;
79	esac
80	case "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" in
81	    0 | 1) ;;
82	    *)
83	        echo "ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS must be 0 or 1" >&2
84	        exit 2
85	        ;;
86	esac
87	if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" && "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
88	    echo "Choose either ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR or ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS, not both." >&2
89	    exit 2
90	fi
91	# TP=8, single-sequence artifact produced by compile_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash.
92	DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"
93	export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
94	export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT}"
95	if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" && "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == "$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT" ]]; then
96	    echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER=native requires a separately compiled native artifact; set NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS." >&2
97	    exit 2
98	fi
99	if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" \
100	    && ( "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "request" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "affinity" ) ]]; then
101	    echo "custom scheduler requires trajectory leases: released KV blocks are evictable, so request or affinity leases can lose a long APC history and kill EngineCore. Use NEURON_SCHEDULER=native for non-trajectory leases." >&2
102	    exit 2
103	fi
104	if [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
105	    echo "No complete Tongyi artifact at: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
106	    echo "Compile the matching scheduler profile before starting runtime replicas." >&2
107	    exit 2
108	fi
109	if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
110	    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
111	        echo "TP8 sidecar only supports custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile a native TP8 artifact before mixing it with request leases." >&2
112	        exit 2
113	    fi
114	    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
115	        echo "TP8 sidecar requires the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
116	        exit 2
117	    fi
118	    if [[ ! -f "$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
119	        echo "No complete TP8 sidecar artifact at: $TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
120	        exit 2
121	    fi
122	    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
123	        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"
124	    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"; then
125	        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include TP8_SIDECAR_PORT=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT when ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR=1." >&2
126	        exit 2
127	    fi
128	    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
129	        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}:1"
130	    fi
131	fi
132	if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
133	    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
134	        echo "TP4 sidecars only support custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile native TP4 artifacts before mixing them with request leases." >&2
135	        exit 2
136	    fi
137	    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
138	        echo "TP4 sidecars require the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
139	        exit 2
140	    fi
141	    if [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
142	        || [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
143	        || (( TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 > 65535 || TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 > 65535 )) \
144	        || [[ "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" == "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" ]]; then
145	        echo "TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 and TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 must be distinct ports in 1..65535." >&2
146	        exit 2
147	    fi
148	    if [[ ! -f "$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
149	        echo "No complete TP4 sidecar artifact at: $TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
150	        echo "Smoke the TP4 artifact before using this experimental topology." >&2
151	        exit 2
152	    fi
153	    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
154	        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"
155	    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" \
156	        || ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"; then
157	        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include both TP4 sidecar ports when ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS=1." >&2
158	        exit 2
159	    fi
160	    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
161	        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1}:1,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2}:1"
162	    fi
163	fi
164	
165	# Detect if running in Docker container
166	if [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then
167	    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"
168	else
169	    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
170	fi
171	NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-$((TONGYI_REPLICAS * 2))}"
172	RUN_EVAL="${RUN_EVAL:-1}"
173	EVAL_BATCH_SIZE="${EVAL_BATCH_SIZE:-32}"
174	MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
175	RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_filter_all_no_get}"
176	QREL_RUNS=(8 4 full)
177	# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive variants. Keep as reference; this
178	# script now runs filter_all on 1/8, then 1/4, then the full qrels.
179	# VARIANTS="${VARIANTS:-saturate refer}"
180	
181	START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
182	START_JUDGE_SERVER="${START_JUDGE_SERVER:-1}"
183	JUDGE_MODEL="${JUDGE_MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
184	JUDGE_PORT="${JUDGE_PORT:-8032}"
185	JUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"
186	JUDGE_TP_SIZE="${JUDGE_TP_SIZE:-4}"
187	JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN="${JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN:-8192}"
188	JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS="${JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
189	JUDGE_NUM_THREADS="${JUDGE_NUM_THREADS:-16}"
190	JUDGE_BASE_URLS="${JUDGE_BASE_URLS:-}"
191	
192	RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
193	CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"
194	PLANNING_LOG_DIR="${PLANNING_LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
195	PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/restarts}"
196	PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="${PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-600}"
197	PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT="${PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT:-2}"
198	PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS="${PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS:-}"
199	if [[ -z "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" && "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" ]]; then
200	    PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS=16384
201	fi
202	SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS="${SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS:-1}"
203	
204	TONGYI_PID=""
205	TP8_SIDECAR_PID=""
206	TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()
207	JUDGE_PID=""
208	PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=0
209	
210	cleanup_pid() {
211	    local pid="$1"
212	    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
213	        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
214	        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
215	    fi
216	}
217	
218	cleanup_pids() {
219	    local pid
220	    for pid in "$@"; do
221	        cleanup_pid "$pid"
222	    done
223	}
224	
225	summarize_planning_logs() {
226	    local log logs=() summary_path temporary_path
227	
228	    [[ "$SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS" == "1" ]] || return 0
229	    [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]] || return 0
230	    [[ "$PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED" == "0" ]] || return 0
231	
232	    for log in "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"/tongyi-*.log; do
233	        [[ -f "$log" ]] && logs+=("$log")
234	    done
235	    (( ${#logs[@]} > 0 )) || return 0
236	
237	    summary_path="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/planning_core_time.json"
238	    temporary_path="$summary_path.tmp.$$"
239	    if "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts/neuron_summarize_vllm_logs.py \
240	        --year "$(date -u +%Y)" \
241	        --json \
242	        "${logs[@]}" >"$temporary_path"; then
243	        mv -- "$temporary_path" "$summary_path"
244	        echo "Planning slot-duty and vacancy summary: $summary_path"
245	        PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=1
246	    else
247	        rm -f -- "$temporary_path"
248	        echo "WARNING: could not summarize planning logs under $PLANNING_LOG_DIR" >&2
249	    fi
250	}
251	
252	cleanup() {
253	    cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
254	    cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"
255	    cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"
256	    summarize_planning_logs
257	    cleanup_pid "$JUDGE_PID"
258	}
259	trap cleanup EXIT
260	trap 'exit 130' INT TERM
261	
262	qrel_dir_for_run() {
263	    case "$1" in
264	        8 | 4) printf "topics-qrels/topics-qrels-%s\n" "$1" ;;
265	        full) printf "%s\n" "topics-qrels" ;;
266	        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
267	    esac
268	}
269	
270	qrel_label_for_run() {
271	    case "$1" in
272	        8 | 4) printf "%sqrel\n" "$1" ;;
273	        full) printf "%s\n" "full" ;;
274	        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
275	    esac
276	}
277	
278	for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
279	    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
280	    for required_file in queries.tsv qrel_evidence.txt qrel_golds.txt; do
281	        if [[ ! -f "$qrel_dir/$required_file" ]]; then
282	            echo "Missing required file: $qrel_dir/$required_file" >&2
283	            exit 1
284	        fi
285	    done
286	done
287	
288	wait_for_server() {
289	    local pid="$1"
290	    local url="$2"
291	
292	    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do
293	        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
294	            wait "$pid"
295	            exit 1
296	        fi
297	        sleep 10
298	    done
299	}
300	
301	wait_for_planning_endpoints() {
302	    local item start end port
303	    local endpoints=()
304	    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
305	    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
306	        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
307	            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
308	            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
309	            if (( start < 1 || end > 65535 || end < start )); then
310	                echo "Invalid planning port range: $item" >&2
311	                exit 2
312	            fi
313	            for ((port = start; port <= end; port++)); do
314	                wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
315	            done
316	        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
317	            port=$((10#$item))
318	            if (( port < 1 || port > 65535 )); then
319	                echo "Invalid planning port: $item" >&2
320	                exit 2
321	            fi
322	            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
323	        else
324	            echo "Invalid planning port entry: $item" >&2
325	            exit 2
326	        fi
327	    done
328	}
329	
330	if [[ -z "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" ]]; then
331	    judge_urls=()
332	    for ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
333	        judge_urls+=("http://127.0.0.1:$((JUDGE_PORT + replica))/v1")
334	    done
335	    JUDGE_BASE_URLS="$(IFS=,; echo "${judge_urls[*]}")"
336	fi

341	    local url
342	    IFS=, read -r -a urls <<< "$raw_urls"
343	    for url in "${urls[@]}"; do
344	        wait_for_server "" "${url%/}/models"
345	    done
346	}

365	start_tongyi_server() {
366	    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
367	        wait_for_planning_endpoints
368	        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
369	        return
370	    fi
371	
372	    EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--no-async-scheduling${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}" \
373	    MODEL="$MODEL" \
374	    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
375	    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
376	    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
377	    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
378	    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
379	    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
380	    NEURON_SCHEDULER="$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
381	    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \
382	    LOG_DIR="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR" \
383	    PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" \
384	        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
385	    TONGYI_PID=$!
386	
387	    for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
388	        wait_for_server \
389	            "$TONGYI_PID" \
390	            "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"
391	    done
392	    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
393	
394	    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
395	        local sidecar_log_dir="${TP8_SIDECAR_LOG_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR}"

397	        mkdir -p "$sidecar_log_dir"
398	        echo "Starting TP8 single-sequence sidecar: port=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT cores=$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES log=$sidecar_log"
399	        numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
400	            env \
401	            MODEL="$MODEL" \
402	            PORT="$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT" \
403	            TP_SIZE=8 \
404	            MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
405	            MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
406	            NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \

408	            NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
409	            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
410	            NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
411	            ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
412	            OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="" \
413	            NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1 \
414	            EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP8_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
415	            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash" \
416	            >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
417	        TP8_SIDECAR_PID=$!
418	        wait_for_server "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}/v1/models"
419	    fi
420	
421	    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
422	        local sidecar_ports=("$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2")
423	        local sidecar_cores=("48-51" "52-55")
424	        local index sidecar_port sidecar_cores_for_port sidecar_log
425	
426	        mkdir -p "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"
427	        for index in "${!sidecar_ports[@]}"; do
428	            sidecar_port="${sidecar_ports[$index]}"
429	            sidecar_cores_for_port="${sidecar_cores[$index]}"
430	            sidecar_log="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/tongyi-${sidecar_port}.log"
431	            echo "Starting experimental TP4 single-sequence sidecar: port=$sidecar_port cores=$sidecar_cores_for_port log=$sidecar_log"
432	            numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
433	                env \
434	                MODEL="$MODEL" \
435	                PORT="$sidecar_port" \
436	                TP_SIZE=4 \
437	                MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
438	                MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \

445	                OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG='{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":128000,"max_context_length":128000,"context_encoding_buckets":[8192],"prefix_buckets":[122880],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
446	                NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix120-tp4-s1 \
447	                EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP4_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
448	                bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
449	                >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
450	            TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS+=("$!")
451	            wait_for_server "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${sidecar_port}/v1/models"
452	        done
453	    fi
454	}

502	        prefix_guard_args=(--planning-max-uncached-prefill-tokens "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS")
503	    fi
504

506	    echo "Neuron embedding endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT"

531	        --qrel-golds-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_golds.txt" \
532	        --filter-all \

534	}

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"

MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET="${PLANNING_PORTS:+1}"
PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-1}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES:-}"
PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT="${PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT:-0.2}"
EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR="${ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR:-0}"
TP8_SIDECAR_PORT="${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
TP8_SIDECAR_CORES="48-55"
TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912}"
ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS="${ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS:-0}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS + 1))}"
TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/27b98ea6f3cabed3fd9ed630d1a2996e28998618d11e43538edbd3d3e09c3586}"

planning_ports_include() {
    local target="$1" item start end
    local endpoints=()
    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
            if (( target >= start && target <= end )); then
                return 0
            fi
        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( target == 10#$item )); then
            return 0
        fi
    done
    return 1
}

# The current custom artifact cannot chunk a cold prompt whose uncached suffix
# exceeds 16k, so only two long trajectories may retain each endpoint's APC
# state. Native scheduling uses chunked prefill and may use any replica.
PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="${PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE:-}"
if [[ -z "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="request"
    else
        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="trajectory"
    fi
fi
case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
    custom | native) ;;
    *)
        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" in
    trajectory | affinity | request) ;;
    *)
        echo "PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE must be trajectory, affinity, or request" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" in
    0 | 1) ;;
    *)
        echo "ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR must be 0 or 1" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" in
    0 | 1) ;;
    *)
        echo "ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS must be 0 or 1" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" && "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Choose either ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR or ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS, not both." >&2
    exit 2
fi
# TP=8, single-sequence artifact produced by compile_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash.
DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"
export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT}"
if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" && "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == "$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER=native requires a separately compiled native artifact; set NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" \
    && ( "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "request" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "affinity" ) ]]; then
    echo "custom scheduler requires trajectory leases: released KV blocks are evictable, so request or affinity leases can lose a long APC history and kill EngineCore. Use NEURON_SCHEDULER=native for non-trajectory leases." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
    echo "No complete Tongyi artifact at: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
    echo "Compile the matching scheduler profile before starting runtime replicas." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
        echo "TP8 sidecar only supports custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile a native TP8 artifact before mixing it with request leases." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
        echo "TP8 sidecar requires the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! -f "$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
        echo "No complete TP8 sidecar artifact at: $TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"
    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"; then
        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include TP8_SIDECAR_PORT=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT when ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR=1." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}:1"
    fi
fi
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
        echo "TP4 sidecars only support custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile native TP4 artifacts before mixing them with request leases." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
        echo "TP4 sidecars require the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
        || [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
        || (( TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 > 65535 || TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 > 65535 )) \
        || [[ "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" == "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" ]]; then
        echo "TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 and TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 must be distinct ports in 1..65535." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! -f "$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
        echo "No complete TP4 sidecar artifact at: $TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
        echo "Smoke the TP4 artifact before using this experimental topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"
    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" \
        || ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"; then
        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include both TP4 sidecar ports when ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS=1." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1}:1,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2}:1"
    fi
fi

# Detect if running in Docker container
if [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then
    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"
else
    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
fi
NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-$((TONGYI_REPLICAS * 2))}"
RUN_EVAL="${RUN_EVAL:-1}"
EVAL_BATCH_SIZE="${EVAL_BATCH_SIZE:-32}"
MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_filter_all_no_get}"
QREL_RUNS=(8 4 full)
# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive variants. Keep as reference; this
# script now runs filter_all on 1/8, then 1/4, then the full qrels.
# VARIANTS="${VARIANTS:-saturate refer}"

START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
START_JUDGE_SERVER="${START_JUDGE_SERVER:-1}"
JUDGE_MODEL="${JUDGE_MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
JUDGE_PORT="${JUDGE_PORT:-8032}"
JUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"
JUDGE_TP_SIZE="${JUDGE_TP_SIZE:-4}"
JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN="${JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN:-8192}"
JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS="${JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
JUDGE_NUM_THREADS="${JUDGE_NUM_THREADS:-16}"
JUDGE_BASE_URLS="${JUDGE_BASE_URLS:-}"

RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"
PLANNING_LOG_DIR="${PLANNING_LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/restarts}"
PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="${PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-600}"
PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT="${PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT:-2}"
PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS="${PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS:-}"
if [[ -z "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" && "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" ]]; then
    PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS=16384
fi
SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS="${SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS:-1}"

TONGYI_PID=""
TP8_SIDECAR_PID=""
TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()
JUDGE_PID=""
PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=0

cleanup_pid() {
    local pid="$1"
    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}

cleanup_pids() {
    local pid
    for pid in "$@"; do
        cleanup_pid "$pid"
    done
}

summarize_planning_logs() {
    local log logs=() summary_path temporary_path

    [[ "$SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS" == "1" ]] || return 0
    [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]] || return 0
    [[ "$PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED" == "0" ]] || return 0

    for log in "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"/tongyi-*.log; do
        [[ -f "$log" ]] && logs+=("$log")
    done
    (( ${#logs[@]} > 0 )) || return 0

    summary_path="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/planning_core_time.json"
    temporary_path="$summary_path.tmp.$$"
    if "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts/neuron_summarize_vllm_logs.py \
        --year "$(date -u +%Y)" \
        --json \
        "${logs[@]}" >"$temporary_path"; then
        mv -- "$temporary_path" "$summary_path"
        echo "Planning slot-duty and vacancy summary: $summary_path"
        PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=1
    else
        rm -f -- "$temporary_path"
        echo "WARNING: could not summarize planning logs under $PLANNING_LOG_DIR" >&2
    fi
}

cleanup() {
    cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
    cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"
    cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"
    summarize_planning_logs
    cleanup_pid "$JUDGE_PID"
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

qrel_dir_for_run() {
    case "$1" in
        8 | 4) printf "topics-qrels/topics-qrels-%s\n" "$1" ;;
        full) printf "%s\n" "topics-qrels" ;;
        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
    esac
}

qrel_label_for_run() {
    case "$1" in
        8 | 4) printf "%sqrel\n" "$1" ;;
        full) printf "%s\n" "full" ;;
        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
    esac
}

for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    for required_file in queries.tsv qrel_evidence.txt qrel_golds.txt; do
        if [[ ! -f "$qrel_dir/$required_file" ]]; then
            echo "Missing required file: $qrel_dir/$required_file" >&2
            exit 1
        fi
    done
done

wait_for_server() {
    local pid="$1"
    local url="$2"

    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do
        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            wait "$pid"
            exit 1
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
}

wait_for_planning_endpoints() {
    local item start end port
    local endpoints=()
    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
            if (( start < 1 || end > 65535 || end < start )); then
                echo "Invalid planning port range: $item" >&2
                exit 2
            fi
            for ((port = start; port <= end; port++)); do
                wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
            done
        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            port=$((10#$item))
            if (( port < 1 || port > 65535 )); then
                echo "Invalid planning port: $item" >&2
                exit 2
            fi
            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
        else
            echo "Invalid planning port entry: $item" >&2
            exit 2
        fi
    done
}

if [[ -z "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" ]]; then
    judge_urls=()
    for ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
        judge_urls+=("http://127.0.0.1:$((JUDGE_PORT + replica))/v1")
    done
    JUDGE_BASE_URLS="$(IFS=,; echo "${judge_urls[*]}")"
fi

wait_for_url_list() {
    local raw_urls="$1"
    local urls=()
    local url
    IFS=, read -r -a urls <<< "$raw_urls"
    for url in "${urls[@]}"; do
        wait_for_server "" "${url%/}/models"
    done
}

# Previous full-qrels output layout for filter-non-positive variants.
# variant_output_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }
#
# variant_cache_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }

start_tongyi_server() {
    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        wait_for_planning_endpoints
        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
        return
    fi

    EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--no-async-scheduling${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}" \
    MODEL="$MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
    NEURON_SCHEDULER="$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \
    LOG_DIR="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR" \
    PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
    TONGYI_PID=$!

    for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
        wait_for_server \
            "$TONGYI_PID" \
            "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"
    done
    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"

    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
        local sidecar_log_dir="${TP8_SIDECAR_LOG_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR}"
        local sidecar_log="$sidecar_log_dir/tongyi-${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}.log"
        mkdir -p "$sidecar_log_dir"
        echo "Starting TP8 single-sequence sidecar: port=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT cores=$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES log=$sidecar_log"
        numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
            env \
            MODEL="$MODEL" \
            PORT="$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT" \
            TP_SIZE=8 \
            MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
            MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
            NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES" \
            NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
            NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
            ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
            OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="" \
            NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1 \
            EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP8_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash" \
            >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
        TP8_SIDECAR_PID=$!
        wait_for_server "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}/v1/models"
    fi

    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
        local sidecar_ports=("$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2")
        local sidecar_cores=("48-51" "52-55")
        local index sidecar_port sidecar_cores_for_port sidecar_log

        mkdir -p "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"
        for index in "${!sidecar_ports[@]}"; do
            sidecar_port="${sidecar_ports[$index]}"
            sidecar_cores_for_port="${sidecar_cores[$index]}"
            sidecar_log="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/tongyi-${sidecar_port}.log"
            echo "Starting experimental TP4 single-sequence sidecar: port=$sidecar_port cores=$sidecar_cores_for_port log=$sidecar_log"
            numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
                env \
                MODEL="$MODEL" \
                PORT="$sidecar_port" \
                TP_SIZE=4 \
                MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
                MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
                NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
                NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$sidecar_cores_for_port" \
                NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
                NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
                NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
                ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
                OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG='{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":128000,"max_context_length":128000,"context_encoding_buckets":[8192],"prefix_buckets":[122880],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
                NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix120-tp4-s1 \
                EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP4_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
                bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
                >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
            TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS+=("$!")
            wait_for_server "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${sidecar_port}/v1/models"
        done
    fi
}

start_judge_server() {
    if [[ "$START_JUDGE_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        wait_for_url_list "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS"
        return
    fi

    MODEL="$JUDGE_MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$JUDGE_PORT" \
    JUDGE_REPLICAS="$JUDGE_REPLICAS" \
    TP_SIZE="$JUDGE_TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash" &
    JUDGE_PID=$!

    # JUDGE_PORT starts last and is the readiness barrier for the full cluster.
    wait_for_server "$JUDGE_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${JUDGE_PORT}/v1/models"
}

run_filter_all_tongyi() {
    local qrel_run="$1"
    local qrel_dir
    local qrel_label
    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    qrel_label="$(qrel_label_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    local output_dir="$RUN_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME"
    local cache_dir="$CACHE_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME"
    local max_query_args=()
    local endpoint_capacity_args=()
    local restart_args=()
    local prefix_guard_args=()

    if [[ -n "$MAX_QUERIES" ]]; then
        max_query_args=(--max-queries "$MAX_QUERIES")
    fi
    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        endpoint_capacity_args=(--planning-endpoint-capacities "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES")
    fi
    if [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
        restart_args=(
            --planning-restart-dir "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"
            --planning-restart-timeout-seconds "$PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS"
            --planning-query-retry-limit "$PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT"
        )
    fi
    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" ]]; then
        prefix_guard_args=(--planning-max-uncached-prefill-tokens "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS")
    fi

    echo "Running filter_all Tongyi on $qrel_label without get_document on planning ports $PLANNING_PORTS"
    echo "Neuron embedding endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT"
    "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py \
        --model "$MODEL" \
        --query "$qrel_dir/queries.tsv" \
        --output-dir "$output_dir" \
        --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \
        --searcher-type faiss \
        --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl" \
        --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B" \
        --normalize \
        --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS" \
        --embedding-base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
        --embedding-timeout 60 \
        --max-length 1024 \
        --planning-ports "$PLANNING_PORTS" \
        --planning-endpoint-capacity "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY" \
        "${endpoint_capacity_args[@]}" \
        --planning-lease-scope "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" \
        --planning-affinity-timeout "$PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT" \
        "${restart_args[@]}" \
        "${prefix_guard_args[@]}" \
        --snippet-max-tokens 512 \
        --k 5 \
        --port "$PORT" \
        --qrel-evidence-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_evidence.txt" \
        --qrel-golds-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_golds.txt" \
        --filter-all \
        "${max_query_args[@]}"
}

# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive runner.
# run_tongyi() {
#     local variant="$1"
#     local output_dir
#     local cache_dir
#     local extra_args=()
#
#     output_dir="$(variant_output_dir "$variant")"
#     cache_dir="$(variant_cache_dir "$variant")"
#
#     case "$variant" in
#         saturated | saturate)
#             extra_args=(--filter-non-positive --id-title-marker --filtered-empty-response saturated)
#             ;;
#         refer)
#             extra_args=(--filter-non-positive --id-title-marker --filtered-empty-response refer-to-context)
#             ;;
#         *)
#             echo "Unknown variant: $variant" >&2
#             return 1
#             ;;
#     esac
#
#     echo "Running $variant on full qrels with Neuron server at port $PORT"
#     "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py \
#         --model "$MODEL" \
#         --query "$QUERY_FILE" \
#         --output-dir "$output_dir" \
#         --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \
#         --searcher-type faiss \
#         --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl" \
#         --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B" \
#         --normalize \
#         --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS" \
#         --snippet-max-tokens 512 \
#         --k 5 \
#         --get-document \
#         --port "$PORT" \
#         --qrel-evidence-path "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \
#         --qrel-golds-path "$QREL_GOLDS_FILE" \
#         "${extra_args[@]}"
# }

start_tongyi_server

for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
    run_filter_all_tongyi "$qrel_run"
done

# for variant in $VARIANTS; do
#     run_tongyi "$variant"
# done

cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
TONGYI_PID=""
cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"
TP8_SIDECAR_PID=""
cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()
summarize_planning_logs

if [[ "$RUN_EVAL" == "1" ]]; then
    start_judge_server

    for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
        qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
        qrel_label="$(qrel_label_for_run "$qrel_run")"
        "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \
            --input_dir "$RUN_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME" \
            --qrel_evidence "$qrel_dir/qrel_evidence.txt" \
            --model "$JUDGE_MODEL" \
            --judge-backend openai-compatible \
            --judge-base-urls "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" \
            --judge-num-threads "$JUDGE_NUM_THREADS" \
            --batch_size "$EVAL_BATCH_SIZE"
    done

    # for variant in $VARIANTS; do
    #     "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \
    #         --input_dir "$(variant_output_dir "$variant")" \
    #         --qrel_evidence "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \
    #         --model "$JUDGE_MODEL" \
    #         --judge-backend openai-compatible \
    #         --judge-base-url "$JUDGE_BASE_URL" \
    #         --batch_size "$EVAL_BATCH_SIZE"
    # done
fi

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	MODEL="${MODEL:?Set MODEL to the Hugging Face model id or local checkpoint path}"
5	REQUESTED_MODEL="$MODEL"
6	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
7	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
8	
9	# Detect if running in Docker container
10	if [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then
11	    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"
12	else
13	    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
14	fi
15	PORT="${PORT:-8000}"
16	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
17	MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-4096}"

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

MODEL="${MODEL:?Set MODEL to the Hugging Face model id or local checkpoint path}"
REQUESTED_MODEL="$MODEL"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

# Detect if running in Docker container
if [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then
    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"
else
    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
fi
PORT="${PORT:-8000}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-4096}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
BLOCK_SIZE="${BLOCK_SIZE:-128}"
NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE="${NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE:-}"
ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING="${ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING:-}"
ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-}"
HOST="${HOST:-0.0.0.0}"
NEURON_FRAMEWORK="${VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK:-neuronx-distributed-inference}"
NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-default}"
NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"

if [[ "$PYTHON_BIN" != /* && -e "$PYTHON_BIN" ]]; then
    PYTHON_BIN="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$PYTHON_BIN")"
fi

SERVED_MODEL_NAME="${SERVED_MODEL_NAME:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
TOKENIZER="${TOKENIZER:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
LOCAL_MODEL_PATH="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/$REQUESTED_MODEL"
MODEL_SOURCE="hugging-face"

has_complete_local_weights() {
    local index_file

    [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/config.json" ]] || return 1
    if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/model.safetensors" || -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/pytorch_model.bin" ]]; then
        return 0
    fi

    for index_file in model.safetensors.index.json pytorch_model.bin.index.json; do
        if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/$index_file" ]]; then
            "$PYTHON_BIN" - "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH" "$index_file" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

model_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
index = json.loads((model_dir / sys.argv[2]).read_text())
shards = set(index.get("weight_map", {}).values())
raise SystemExit(not shards or any(not (model_dir / shard).is_file() for shard in shards))
PY
            return
        fi
    done

    return 1
}

if [[ -e "$REQUESTED_MODEL" ]]; then
    if [[ "$REQUESTED_MODEL" == /* ]]; then
        MODEL="$REQUESTED_MODEL"
    else
        MODEL="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")"
    fi
    MODEL_SOURCE="local-explicit"
elif has_complete_local_weights; then
    MODEL="$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH"
    MODEL_SOURCE="local-cache"
fi

if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
    OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=$(printf '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN")
fi

export VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK="$NEURON_FRAMEWORK"
export PATH="$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN"):$PATH"

if [[ -z "${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-}" ]]; then
    stack_versions="$("$PYTHON_BIN" -c '
from importlib.metadata import PackageNotFoundError, version

packages = (
    "vllm",
    "vllm-neuron",
    "torch-neuronx",
    "neuronx-distributed",
    "neuronx-distributed-inference",
    "neuronx-cc",
    "nki",
)

def installed_version(name):
    try:
        return version(name)
    except PackageNotFoundError:
        return "missing"

print("|".join(f"{name}={installed_version(name)}" for name in packages))
')"
    cache_fingerprint="$(printf '%s\n' \
        "model=$REQUESTED_MODEL" \
        "tp_size=$TP_SIZE" \
        "max_model_len=$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
        "max_num_seqs=$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        "block_size=$BLOCK_SIZE" \
        "num_gpu_blocks_override=$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \
        "enable_prefix_caching=$ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING" \
        "enable_chunked_prefill=$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL" \
        "neuron_scheduler=$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
        "framework=$NEURON_FRAMEWORK" \
        "override_neuron_config=$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
        "extra_vllm_args=${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
        "cache_tag=$NEURON_CACHE_TAG" \
        "stack=$stack_versions")"
    cache_hash="$(sha256sum <<< "$cache_fingerprint")"
    cache_hash="${cache_hash%% *}"
    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/$cache_hash"
fi
export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS

artifact_state="cold"
if [[ -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
    artifact_state="ready"
elif [[ -n "$(find "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
    artifact_state="incomplete"
fi

if [[ "$artifact_state" == "incomplete" && "${NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
    incomplete_artifact="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
    mv -- "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" "$incomplete_artifact"
    printf 'Quarantined incomplete Neuron artifact: %s\n' "$incomplete_artifact"
    artifact_state="cold"
fi

if [[ "${NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" && "$artifact_state" != "ready" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 but no complete model.pt exists at:" >&2
    echo "  $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
    echo "Run the matching compile script once before starting runtime replicas." >&2
    exit 1
fi

args=(
    "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server
    --model "$MODEL"
    --tokenizer "$TOKENIZER"
    --host "$HOST"
    --port "$PORT"
    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE"
    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS"
    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE"
)

if [[ -n "${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-}" ]]; then
    args=(
        "$PYTHON_BIN" -m search_agent.neuron_vllm_launcher
        "${args[@]:3}"
    )
fi

args+=(--served-model-name "$SERVED_MODEL_NAME")

if [[ -n "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" ]]; then
    args+=(--num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE")
fi

case "$ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING" in
    1 | true) args+=(--enable-prefix-caching) ;;
    0 | false) args+=(--no-enable-prefix-caching) ;;
    "") ;;
    *) echo "ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING must be 0, 1, true, or false" >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

case "$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL" in
    1 | true) args+=(--enable-chunked-prefill) ;;
    0 | false) args+=(--no-enable-chunked-prefill) ;;
    "") ;;
    *) echo "ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL must be 0, 1, true, or false" >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

if [[ -n "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" ]]; then
    args+=(--additional-config "{\"override_neuron_config\":$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG}")
fi

if [[ -n "${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" ]]; then
    read -r -a extra_args <<< "$EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS"
    args+=("${extra_args[@]}")
fi

printf 'Starting Neuron vLLM server for %s on port %s (TP=%s, max_len=%s, max_seqs=%s, block_size=%s)\n' \
    "$SERVED_MODEL_NAME" "$PORT" "$TP_SIZE" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" "$BLOCK_SIZE"
printf 'Model weights: %s (%s)\n' "$MODEL" "$MODEL_SOURCE"
printf 'Tokenizer: %s\n' "$TOKENIZER"
printf 'Neuron compiled artifacts: %s (%s, tag=%s)\n' \
    "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" "$artifact_state" "$NEURON_CACHE_TAG"
printf 'Visible NeuronCores: %s\n' "${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-all}"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"
exec "${args[@]}"

file.content:
version: '3.8'

services:
  neuron-vllm:
    image: public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.16.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
    container_name: browsecomp-neuron-vllm
    network_mode: host
    privileged: true  # Required for Neuron device access

    volumes:
      # Model weights and compiled artifacts (read-write)
      - ./local-models:/workspace/local-models

      # Logs (read-write)
      - ./logs:/workspace/logs

      # Data and queries (read-only)
      - ./data:/workspace/data:ro
      - ./topics-qrels:/workspace/topics-qrels:ro

      # Custom launcher script
      - ./search_agent/neuron_vllm_launcher.py:/workspace/neuron_vllm_launcher.py:ro

      # Bash scripts for reference
      - ./bash/neuron:/workspace/bash/neuron:ro

    environment:
      # Neuron runtime configuration
      - NEURON_RT_NUM_CORES=64
      - NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES=0-63

      # vLLM Neuron framework
      - VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK=neuronx-distributed-inference

      # Compilation cache
      - NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL=/workspace/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts

      # Python path for custom launcher
      - PYTHONPATH=/workspace

      # Working directory
      - WORKDIR=/workspace

    working_dir: /workspace

    # Keep container running for exec commands
    command: tail -f /dev/null

    restart: unless-stopped

    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "neuron-ls"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s

  # Separate service for embedding if needed
  neuron-embedding:
    image: public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-neuronx:2.9.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
    container_name: browsecomp-neuron-embedding
    network_mode: host
    privileged: true

    volumes:
      - ./local-models:/workspace/local-models
      - ./logs:/workspace/logs
      - ./search_agent:/workspace/search_agent:ro

    environment:
      - NEURON_RT_NUM_CORES=8
      - NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES=56-63
      - PYTHONPATH=/workspace

    working_dir: /workspace

    command: tail -f /dev/null

    restart: unless-stopped

    # Only start when explicitly needed
    profiles:
      - embedding

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -o pipefail
3	
4	# Check Neuron environment and recommend deployment method
5	
6	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
7	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
8	
9	echo "=== Neuron Environment Check ==="
10	echo ""
11	
12	# Check Docker
13	echo "1. Docker availability:"
14	if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
15	    DOCKER_VERSION=$(docker --version)
16	    echo "   ✅ Docker installed: $DOCKER_VERSION"
17	
18	    # Check if user can run Docker
19	    if docker ps &> /dev/null; then
20	        echo "   ✅ Docker is accessible (no sudo required)"
21	        DOCKER_OK=1
22	    else
23	        echo "   ⚠️  Docker requires sudo (may need to add user to docker group)"
24	        DOCKER_OK=0
25	    fi
26	else
27	    echo "   ❌ Docker not installed"
28	    DOCKER_OK=0
29	fi
30	echo ""
31	
32	# Check Neuron devices
33	echo "2. Neuron devices:"
34	NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT=$(find /dev -name "neuron*" -type c 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
35	NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT=${NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT:-0}
36	if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
37	    echo "   ✅ Found $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT Neuron device(s)"
38	    find /dev -name "neuron*" -type c 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read -r device; do
39	        echo "      - $device"
40	    done
41	    if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 5 ]]; then
42	        echo "      ... and $(( NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT - 5 )) more"
43	    fi
44	else
45	    echo "   ❌ No Neuron devices found at /dev/neuron*"
46	    echo "      This system may not have Neuron hardware or drivers"
47	fi
48	echo ""
49	
50	# Check neuron-ls
51	echo "3. Neuron tools:"
52	if command -v neuron-ls &> /dev/null; then
53	    echo "   ✅ neuron-ls available"
54	    NEURON_CORES=$(neuron-ls 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Neuron Device" | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
55	    echo "   ✅ Detected $NEURON_CORES NeuronCore groups"
56	else
57	    echo "   ❌ neuron-ls not found (Neuron SDK not installed or not in PATH)"
58	fi
59	echo ""
60	
61	# Check native venv
62	echo "4. Native Neuron environments:"
63	if [[ -d "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron" ]]; then
64	    echo "   ✅ .venv-neuron exists"
65	    if [[ -x "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python" ]]; then
66	        VLLM_VERSION=$("$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python" -m pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i vllm | head -1 || echo "not installed")
67	        echo "      vLLM: $VLLM_VERSION"
68	    fi
69	    NATIVE_VENV=1
70	else
71	    echo "   ❌ .venv-neuron does not exist"
72	    NATIVE_VENV=0
73	fi
74	
75	if [[ -d "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron-embedding" ]]; then
76	    echo "   ✅ .venv-neuron-embedding exists"
77	    EMBEDDING_VENV=1
78	else
79	    echo "   ❌ .venv-neuron-embedding does not exist"
80	    EMBEDDING_VENV=0
81	fi
82	echo ""
83	
84	# Check compiled artifacts
85	echo "5. Compiled artifacts:"
86	COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts"
87	if [[ -d "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" ]]; then
88	    ARTIFACT_COUNT=$(find "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
89	    if [[ ${ARTIFACT_COUNT:-0} -gt 0 ]]; then
90	        echo "   ✅ Found $ARTIFACT_COUNT compiled artifact directory(ies)"
91	        DISK_USAGE=$(du -sh "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
92	        echo "      Total size: $DISK_USAGE"
93	    else
94	        echo "   ⚠️  Compiled artifacts directory exists but is empty"
95	    fi
96	else
97	    echo "   ❌ No compiled artifacts directory"
98	fi
99	echo ""
100	
101	# Recommendation
102	echo "=== Recommendation ==="
103	echo ""
104	
105	if [[ $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ]]; then
106	    echo "✅ RECOMMENDED: Use Docker-based deployment"
107	    echo ""
108	    echo "Reasons:"
109	    echo "  - Simplifies environment management (no manual venv setup)"
110	    echo "  - Official AWS-maintained container with tested package versions"
111	    echo "  - Easier to upgrade Neuron SDK versions"
112	    echo "  - Better isolation and reproducibility"
113	    echo ""
114	    echo "Quick start:"
115	    echo "  1. Pull container:"
116	    echo "     docker pull public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.16.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04"
117	    echo ""
118	    echo "  2. Compile Tongyi:"
119	    echo "     bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi_docker.bash"
120	    echo ""
121	    echo "  3. Serve model:"
122	    echo "     MODEL=\"Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B\" bash bash/neuron/serve_vllm_docker.bash"
123	    echo ""
124	    echo "See docs/neuron_docker_quickstart.md for full guide"
125	elif [[ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 ]]; then
126	    echo "✅ USE: Native deployment (Docker not available)"
127	    echo ""
128	    echo "Your native environment is set up. Continue using:"
129	    echo "  bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash"
130	    echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash"
131	    echo ""
132	    echo "To set up Docker later, install Docker and add your user to the docker group:"
133	    echo "  sudo apt-get install docker.io"
134	    echo "  sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
135	    echo "  newgrp docker"
136	else
137	    echo "⚠️  Neither Docker nor native environment is ready"
138	    echo ""
139	    echo "Choose one setup method:"
140	    echo ""
141	    echo "OPTION A - Docker (Recommended):"
142	    echo "  1. Install Docker:"
143	    echo "     sudo apt-get install docker.io"
144	    echo "     sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
145	    echo "     newgrp docker"
146	    echo ""
147	    echo "  2. Follow docs/neuron_docker_quickstart.md"
148	    echo ""
149	    echo "OPTION B - Native:"
150	    echo "  1. Follow docs/neuron_trn2.md environment setup section"
151	    echo "  2. Run bash/neuron/setup_qwen3_embedding_env.bash if needed"
152	fi
153	echo ""
154	
155	# Check for potential issues
156	echo "=== Potential Issues ==="
157	echo ""
158	
159	if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -eq 0 ]]; then
160	    echo "❌ CRITICAL: No Neuron devices detected"
161	    echo "   - Verify you're on a Trn2 instance"
162	    echo "   - Check Neuron driver installation"
163	    echo ""
164	fi
165	
166	if [[ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 && $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ]]; then
167	    echo "ℹ️  INFO: Both Docker and native environments available"
168	    echo "   - Compiled artifacts are compatible between both"
169	    echo "   - Can run smoke tests in Docker before migrating fully"
170	    echo "   - Recommend using Docker for new work"
171	    echo ""
172	fi
173	
174	if [[ $DOCKER_OK -eq 0 ]] && docker ps &> /dev/null 2>&1; then
175	    echo "ℹ️  INFO: Docker works with sudo but not as current user"
176	    echo "   - Add user to docker group: sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
177	    echo "   - Then log out and back in, or run: newgrp docker"
178	    echo ""
179	fi
180	
181	echo "=== Summary ==="
182	echo "Docker deployment:   $([ $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ] && echo '✅ Ready' || echo '❌ Not available')"
183	echo "Native deployment:   $([ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 ] && echo '✅ Ready' || echo '❌ Not set up')"
184	echo "Neuron hardware:     $([ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 0 ] && echo '✅ Available' || echo '❌ Not detected')"
185	echo ""
186

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -o pipefail

# Check Neuron environment and recommend deployment method

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

echo "=== Neuron Environment Check ==="
echo ""

# Check Docker
echo "1. Docker availability:"
if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
    DOCKER_VERSION=$(docker --version)
    echo "   ✅ Docker installed: $DOCKER_VERSION"

    # Check if user can run Docker
    if docker ps &> /dev/null; then
        echo "   ✅ Docker is accessible (no sudo required)"
        DOCKER_OK=1
    else
        echo "   ⚠️  Docker requires sudo (may need to add user to docker group)"
        DOCKER_OK=0
    fi
else
    echo "   ❌ Docker not installed"
    DOCKER_OK=0
fi
echo ""

# Check Neuron devices
echo "2. Neuron devices:"
NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT=$(find /dev -name "neuron*" -type c 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT=${NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT:-0}
if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
    echo "   ✅ Found $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT Neuron device(s)"
    find /dev -name "neuron*" -type c 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read -r device; do
        echo "      - $device"
    done
    if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 5 ]]; then
        echo "      ... and $(( NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT - 5 )) more"
    fi
else
    echo "   ❌ No Neuron devices found at /dev/neuron*"
    echo "      This system may not have Neuron hardware or drivers"
fi
echo ""

# Check neuron-ls
echo "3. Neuron tools:"
if command -v neuron-ls &> /dev/null; then
    echo "   ✅ neuron-ls available"
    NEURON_CORES=$(neuron-ls 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Neuron Device" | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
    echo "   ✅ Detected $NEURON_CORES NeuronCore groups"
else
    echo "   ❌ neuron-ls not found (Neuron SDK not installed or not in PATH)"
fi
echo ""

# Check native venv
echo "4. Native Neuron environments:"
if [[ -d "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron" ]]; then
    echo "   ✅ .venv-neuron exists"
    if [[ -x "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python" ]]; then
        VLLM_VERSION=$("$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python" -m pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i vllm | head -1 || echo "not installed")
        echo "      vLLM: $VLLM_VERSION"
    fi
    NATIVE_VENV=1
else
    echo "   ❌ .venv-neuron does not exist"
    NATIVE_VENV=0
fi

if [[ -d "$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron-embedding" ]]; then
    echo "   ✅ .venv-neuron-embedding exists"
    EMBEDDING_VENV=1
else
    echo "   ❌ .venv-neuron-embedding does not exist"
    EMBEDDING_VENV=0
fi
echo ""

# Check compiled artifacts
echo "5. Compiled artifacts:"
COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts"
if [[ -d "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" ]]; then
    ARTIFACT_COUNT=$(find "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' \n' || echo "0")
    if [[ ${ARTIFACT_COUNT:-0} -gt 0 ]]; then
        echo "   ✅ Found $ARTIFACT_COUNT compiled artifact directory(ies)"
        DISK_USAGE=$(du -sh "$COMPILED_ARTIFACTS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
        echo "      Total size: $DISK_USAGE"
    else
        echo "   ⚠️  Compiled artifacts directory exists but is empty"
    fi
else
    echo "   ❌ No compiled artifacts directory"
fi
echo ""

# Recommendation
echo "=== Recommendation ==="
echo ""

if [[ $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ]]; then
    echo "✅ RECOMMENDED: Use Docker-based deployment"
    echo ""
    echo "Reasons:"
    echo "  - Simplifies environment management (no manual venv setup)"
    echo "  - Official AWS-maintained container with tested package versions"
    echo "  - Easier to upgrade Neuron SDK versions"
    echo "  - Better isolation and reproducibility"
    echo ""
    echo "Quick start:"
    echo "  1. Pull container:"
    echo "     docker pull public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.16.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04"
    echo ""
    echo "  2. Compile Tongyi:"
    echo "     bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi_docker.bash"
    echo ""
    echo "  3. Serve model:"
    echo "     MODEL=\"Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B\" bash bash/neuron/serve_vllm_docker.bash"
    echo ""
    echo "See docs/neuron_docker_quickstart.md for full guide"
elif [[ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 ]]; then
    echo "✅ USE: Native deployment (Docker not available)"
    echo ""
    echo "Your native environment is set up. Continue using:"
    echo "  bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash"
    echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash"
    echo ""
    echo "To set up Docker later, install Docker and add your user to the docker group:"
    echo "  sudo apt-get install docker.io"
    echo "  sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
    echo "  newgrp docker"
else
    echo "⚠️  Neither Docker nor native environment is ready"
    echo ""
    echo "Choose one setup method:"
    echo ""
    echo "OPTION A - Docker (Recommended):"
    echo "  1. Install Docker:"
    echo "     sudo apt-get install docker.io"
    echo "     sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
    echo "     newgrp docker"
    echo ""
    echo "  2. Follow docs/neuron_docker_quickstart.md"
    echo ""
    echo "OPTION B - Native:"
    echo "  1. Follow docs/neuron_trn2.md environment setup section"
    echo "  2. Run bash/neuron/setup_qwen3_embedding_env.bash if needed"
fi
echo ""

# Check for potential issues
echo "=== Potential Issues ==="
echo ""

if [[ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -eq 0 ]]; then
    echo "❌ CRITICAL: No Neuron devices detected"
    echo "   - Verify you're on a Trn2 instance"
    echo "   - Check Neuron driver installation"
    echo ""
fi

if [[ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 && $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ]]; then
    echo "ℹ️  INFO: Both Docker and native environments available"
    echo "   - Compiled artifacts are compatible between both"
    echo "   - Can run smoke tests in Docker before migrating fully"
    echo "   - Recommend using Docker for new work"
    echo ""
fi

if [[ $DOCKER_OK -eq 0 ]] && docker ps &> /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ℹ️  INFO: Docker works with sudo but not as current user"
    echo "   - Add user to docker group: sudo usermod -aG docker \$USER"
    echo "   - Then log out and back in, or run: newgrp docker"
    echo ""
fi

echo "=== Summary ==="
echo "Docker deployment:   $([ $DOCKER_OK -eq 1 ] && echo '✅ Ready' || echo '❌ Not available')"
echo "Native deployment:   $([ $NATIVE_VENV -eq 1 ] && echo '✅ Ready' || echo '❌ Not set up')"
echo "Neuron hardware:     $([ $NEURON_DEVICE_COUNT -gt 0 ] && echo '✅ Available' || echo '❌ Not detected')"
echo ""

content.content:
# vLLM Neuron Plugin (Beta)

The vLLM Neuron plugin is the recommended serving solution for large language models on AWS Trainium. It extends [vLLM](https://docs.vllm.ai/) with a Neuron backend, providing the same vLLM APIs and configuration you are already familiar with.

> **If you are using vLLM with NxD Inference (0.5.x plugin version),** see the [release-0.5.3 branch](https://github.com/aws-neuron/private-vllm-neuron/tree/release-0.5.3) and the [NxD Inference + vLLM documentation](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/index.html). To migrate to the plugin based on 0.21.0+, see the [migration guide](docs/getting-started/migration-nxdi-to-vllm-neuron.md).

## Installation

```bash
git clone -b release-0.21.0.1.0.0 https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron.git
cd vllm-neuron
pip install --extra-index-url=https://pip.repos.neuron.amazonaws.com -e .
```

This installs the vLLM Neuron plugin from source along with vLLM and the required Neuron SDK packages. See [Version](#version) for the full compatibility matrix.

**For detailed environment setup and instance selection**: See the [Setup guide](docs/getting-started/setup-guide.md).

## Quick Start

Run the following command from a shell terminal in the local or instance environment (`vllm` must be in the path) where vLLM is configured:

```bash
vllm serve openai/gpt-oss-20b \
    --tensor-parallel-size 8 \
    --max-model-len 8192 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 4096 \
    --max-num-seqs 4
```

## Supported Models

Models listed below are tested end-to-end on Neuron hardware with correctness validation and performance benchmarking.

| Family | Model | Type | Instance | Correctness | Perf Test | Perf Tuning |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| GPT-OSS | 20B, 120B | Text | Trn2, Trn3 | ✅ | ✅ | In progress |
| Qwen3-VL | 32B (Dense) | Multimodal | Trn2, Trn3 | ✅ | ✅ | In progress |

- **Correctness** — Accuracy validation passing (logit comparison, dataset accuracy validation)
- **Perf Test** — Performance benchmark tests tracked across releases
- **Perf Tuning** — Active optimization work being done

> **Note:** This list includes only the models currently supported in the latest plugin version and does not include models under development or on roadmap.

Performance improvements are delivered incrementally with each Neuron release.

## Features

Feature support is at the framework level. See the model cards in [`docs/model-recipes/`](docs/model-recipes/) for per-model feature availability and the [features guide](docs/guides/features-guide.md) for configuration details.

| Category | Feature | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **Serving** | Continuous batching | ✅ |
| | OpenAI-compatible APIs | ✅ |
| | Streaming | ✅ |
| | Structured outputs (JSON, regex, grammar) | ✅ |
| | Tool calling | ✅ |
| | LoRA adapters | ❌ |
| | Weight reload API | ❌ |
| | Sleep mode (sleep/wake_up API) | ❌ |
| **Parallelism** | Tensor parallelism (TP) | ✅ |
| | Sequence parallelism (SP) | ✅ |
| | Data parallelism (DP) | ✅ |
| | Expert parallelism (EP) | ✅ |
| | Vision encoder parallelism | ✅ |
| | Pipeline parallelism (PP) | ❌ |
| | Context parallelism (CP) | ❌ |
| **Performance** | Paged KV cache | ✅ |
| | Prefix caching | ✅ |
| | Segmented prefill | ✅ |
| | Chunked prefill (mixed batching) | ❌ |
| | Disaggregated inference (1P1D, xPyD) | ✅ |
| | Async scheduling | ✅ |
| | On-device sampling (top-k, top-p, temperature) | ✅ |
| | KV cache offloading | ❌ |
| | Disaggregated encoder | ❌ |
| **Compilation** | torch.compile (XLA backend) | ✅ |
| | torch.compile (native PyTorch) | ❌ |
| | Compile cache (local/remote) | ✅ |
| | CPU compilation | ✅ |
| **Speculative Decoding** | EAGLE3 | ✅ |
| | MTP | ❌ |
| **Quantization** | BF16 | ✅ |
| | FP8 | ✅ |
| | Quantized KV cache (FP8) | ✅ |
| | MXFP4 weights (Trn3) | ✅ |
| | MXFP8 weights (Trn3) | ❌ |
| **Multimodal Inputs** | Images + text | ✅ |
| | Videos + text | ✅ |
| | Audio | ❌ |
| **Observability** | Production metrics (`/metrics` endpoint) | ✅ |
| | Profiler API | ✅ |

**Status legend:**

- ✅ Supported — integrated and tested for at least one model
- ❌ Not supported — may be considered for future releases

## Documentation

Full documentation sources are found in [`docs/`](docs/). These docs are published to [awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/vllm-neuron](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/vllm-neuron/docs/index.html).

**Deploying supported models:**

| Folder | What's inside |
|---|---|
| [`docs/getting-started/`](docs/getting-started/) | Setup, quickstarts, migration from NxD Inference |
| [`docs/guides/`](docs/guides/) | Features guide, configuration reference, metrics, profiling |
| [`docs/model-recipes/`](docs/model-recipes/) | Per-model deployment recipes |
| [`docs/tutorials/`](docs/tutorials/) | End-to-end walkthroughs (DI, prefix caching, etc.) |

**Implementing new models & optimizing performance:**

| Folder | What's inside |
|---|---|
| [`docs/model-dev/`](docs/model-dev/) | Model onboarding, CPU development, etc. |
| [`docs/design/`](docs/design/) | Architecture deep dives (parallelism, DI, prefix caching, etc.) |

## Version

Starting with 0.21.0, the vLLM Neuron plugin version follows the format `<vLLM version>.<plugin version>` (e.g., `0.21.0.1.0.0` means vLLM 0.21.0, plugin version 1.0.0). Model implementations live directly in the plugin and NxD Inference is no longer a dependency. Customers on 0.5.x can migrate using the [migration guide](docs/getting-started/migration-nxdi-to-vllm-neuron.md).

| vLLM-Neuron Plugin | vLLM Version | Neuron SDK | NxD Inference | Instance Support | Status | Documentation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.21.0.1.0.0 (latest) | 0.21.0 | 2.31 | Not required | Trn2, Trn3 | Beta | [vLLM Neuron docs](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/vllm-neuron/docs/index.html) |
| 0.5.3 | 0.16.0 | 2.31 | 0.10.x | Trn1, Trn2, Trn3, Inf2 | Maintenance | [NxDI + vLLM on Neuron docs](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/index.html) |

## Issues

Report bugs or request features: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/issues)

## Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Amazon Open Source Code of Conduct](https://aws.github.io/code-of-conduct). For more information, see the [Code of Conduct FAQ](https://aws.github.io/code-of-conduct-faq) or contact <opensource-codeofconduct@amazon.com>.

## License

Apache-2.0
